label: Cart Service
description: Manages per-user shopping carts for the Online Boutique e-commerce platform. Provides a gRPC API for adding items to a cart, retrieving cart contents, and emptying a cart. Supports pluggable storage backends (Redis, Google Cloud Spanner, AlloyDB, or in-memory) selected at startup via environment variables. Cart data is keyed by user ID, and item quantities are accumulated when the same product is added multiple times.
responsibilities: Store and retrieve per-user shopping cart contents
Add items to a user's cart, accumulating quantity for duplicate products
Empty all items from a user's cart
Support multiple pluggable storage backends selected at startup via environment configuration
Expose a gRPC health check endpoint for readiness probes
